name: sign_in_otp
description: Send a magic link or OTP code to the user's email or phone for passwordless authentication.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Email address to send magic link to. Required if phone not provided.

parameters.name: phone
parameters.description: Phone number to send OTP to. Required if email not provided.

parameters.name: create_user
parameters.description: Create a new user if one does not exist (default true).

parameters.name: data
parameters.description: Custom user metadata for new users.
